system.name: Yogasana
system.description: Machine Learning-based Yoga Pose Evaluation System

algorithm.feature_extraction: MediaPipe Pose Landmarker extracts 33 3D body landmark coordinates at 30 FPS.
joint_angles: Calculate 8 critical joint angles in 2D space (using X and Y coordinates on the camera image plane).
For joint B between points A and C, compute vectors BA = A - B and BC = C - B.
The angle theta = arccos((BA . BC) / (|BA| * |BC|)) in degrees, normalized to range [0, 180].

classification.input_features: 8 normalized joint angles: [left_elbow, right_elbow, left_shoulder, right_shoulder, left_hip, right_hip, left_knee, right_knee]
classification.output: Pose name (e.g., Mountain Pose, Tree Pose, Warrior II, Chair Pose, Cobra Pose, Triangle Pose)

posture_evaluation.error_calculation: Average_Error = mean(|Actual_Angle[i] - Template_Angle[i]|) for all active joints

left_shoulder.too_high: Lower your left arm to your side.

right_shoulder.too_high: Lower your right arm to your side.

left_hip.too_low: Stand up straight, do not bend forward at your hips.

right_hip.too_low: Stand up straight, do not bend forward at your hips.

left_elbow.too_low: Bend your left elbow more, bring hands to prayer.

right_elbow.too_low: Bend your right elbow more, bring hands to prayer.

left_shoulder.too_low: Raise your left shoulder slightly, broaden your chest.

right_shoulder.too_low: Raise your right shoulder slightly, broaden your chest.

left_hip.too_low: Open your left hip, press your knee out.
left_hip.too_high: Bring your left knee out more, aligning your hip.

right_hip.too_low: Stand tall on your right leg, don't sag at the hip.

left_knee.too_low: Raise your left foot higher on your right leg.
left_knee.too_high: Bend your left knee more to place foot on inner thigh.

right_knee.too_low: Lock your standing right knee straight.

left_elbow.too_low: Straighten your left arm, extend through fingers.

right_elbow.too_low: Straighten your right arm, reach backward.

left_shoulder.too_low: Raise your left arm to shoulder level.
left_shoulder.too_high: Lower your left arm to shoulder level.

right_shoulder.too_low: Raise your right arm to shoulder level.
right_shoulder.too_high: Lower your right arm to shoulder level.

left_hip.too_high: Align your hips, square to the side.

right_hip.too_low: Extend through your back right hip.

left_knee.too_low: Bend your left knee more to a 90 degree angle.
left_knee.too_high: Straighten your front knee slightly, do not go past ankle.

left_elbow.too_low: Straighten your left elbow, raise arms high.

right_elbow.too_low: Straighten your right elbow, raise arms high.

left_shoulder.too_low: Reach your left arm higher and back.

right_shoulder.too_low: Reach your right arm higher and back.

left_hip.too_high: Sit your hips back and down, bend hips more.

right_hip.too_high: Sit your hips back and down, bend hips more.

left_knee.too_high: Don't squat too deep, lift your hips slightly.

right_knee.too_high: Don't squat too deep, lift your hips slightly.

left_elbow.too_low: Bend your left elbow slightly, hug it to your side.
left_elbow.too_high: Extend through your spine, raise chest more.

right_elbow.too_low: Bend your right elbow slightly, hug it to your side.
right_elbow.too_high: Extend through your spine, raise chest more.

left_shoulder.too_low: Roll your shoulders back and down, open your chest.
left_shoulder.too_high: Relax your shoulders away from your ears.

right_shoulder.too_low: Roll your shoulders back and down, open your chest.
right_shoulder.too_high: Relax your shoulders away from your ears.

left_hip.too_low: Press your pelvis firmly into the floor.
left_hip.too_high: Keep your hips on the mat.

right_hip.too_low: Press your pelvis firmly into the floor.
right_hip.too_high: Keep your hips on the mat.

left_knee.too_low: Keep your legs straight and active on the floor.

right_knee.too_low: Keep your legs straight and active on the floor.

left_elbow.too_low: Extend your left arm straight towards the ground.

right_elbow.too_low: Extend your right arm straight up to the sky.

left_shoulder.too_low: Open your shoulders, raise your arms horizontally.
left_shoulder.too_high: Keep your arms in a straight vertical line.

right_shoulder.too_low: Open your shoulders, raise your arms horizontally.
right_shoulder.too_high: Keep your arms in a straight vertical line.

left_hip.too_low: Hinge deeply at your side hip.
left_hip.too_high: Open your chest, press your hips forward.

right_hip.too_low: Lengthen through your right side body.
